title: The Passport (Sixth Amendment) Rules, 1979 (09.05.1979)
text: REGISTERED No. D . (D.)-72 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 142] NEW DELHI, WEDNESDAY, MAY 9, 1979/VAISAKHA 19, 1901 Separate paging is given to this part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation. 114 GI/79 (683) -- 1 of 2 -- 684 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)J MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 9th Moy, 1979 C.S.R. 288(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section (1), lend with clause (f) of sub-section (2), of section 24 of the Passports Act, 1967 (15 of 1967), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Passports Rules, 1967, namely :— 1, These rules may be called the Passports (Sixth Amendment) Rules, 1979. 2. In the Passport Rules, 1967, rule 7 shall be renumbered as sub-rule fl) thereof, and after sub-rulo i 1) us so renumbered, the following nub-rule shall be inserted, namely :— "(2) Notwithstanding anything contained in this rule or in Schedule V, no fee shall be payable on any application for the issue of India-Sri Lanka Passport to a person who has been granted Indian citizen- ship under the Indiu-Sri Lanka Repatriation Agreement entered into in 1964 or 1974." [No. VI/401/20/79] K, D. SHARMA, it. Secy. PRINTED BY THE MANAGER, COVT. OP INDIA PRESS, RING ROAD. NEW PCLHI-110064 AND PUBLISHED HY THE CONTROLLER OF PUBLICATIONS, DELHJ-110054 1 9 7 9 -- 2 of 2 --
